title: manulea diandra
intro: Manulea diandra, also known as the white manulea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, including coughs and colds. Manulea diandra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
